properties.description: 70 amp Tesla Roadster charger In the rear of the Comfort Inn hotel. Tesla Model S's can too, but you have to bring your own Roadster-to-S adapter.
Currently, only Tesla vehicles can charge here. Posts do not have either MagicDock (CCS1 adapter) or non-Tesla NACS port/adapter support.
properties.name: Tesla Supercharger
properties.note: Despite iD prompting to "upgrade" operator from "Tesla, Inc." to "Tesla", the correct value is in fact "Tesla, Inc." Work is in progress to stop iD from flagging this.
